instructions.summary: Install the Mac Runner Launch Agent so iMessage replies are picked up automatically
instructions.detail: The Mac Runner reads your iMessage replies and bridges them into the repo. It must be installed and running before you reply to the idea proposals, otherwise your reply will never be picked up.
instructions.exact_action: Run in Terminal: cp /Users/carlos.miranda/Developer/founder-os-seed/.github/launch-agents/com.founder.mac-runner.plist ~/Library/LaunchAgents/ && launchctl load ~/Library/LaunchAgents/com.founder.mac-runner.plist
instructions.unblocks: iMessage reply handling — without this your idea reply will never be read
